title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aravind Eye Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aravind Eye Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aravind Eye Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aravind Eye Hospital:
Aravind Eye Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aravind Eye Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
